metadata.note: Fixture-scoped synthetic player persona roster for Synthetic Player Persona Agents v1 (#1606). Human-like (skill, aggression) personas that drive the existing deck-roguelike probe (#1601) deterministically; not win-maximizers. Skill 0-100 governs misplay/fumble rate; aggression 0-100 governs attack-vs-block style. Seeded persona decision stream is independent of the deck shuffle stream.
